title: Unlock the kiosk with a valid PIN
description: This test verifies that a visitor can enter a kiosk PIN and unlock the kiosk to access operational actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /kiosk
Fill kiosk PIN with a valid PIN
Submit the PIN
Verify the kiosk is unlocked
Verify kiosk transaction actions are available

title: View the contact page and submit an inquiry
description: Verifies that a visitor can open the contact form and submit an inquiry successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a valid message
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Submit a contact inquiry
description: This verifies that a visitor can fill out the contact form and successfully submit a message.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with Test User
Fill in the email field with test.user@example.com
Fill in the message field with a contact inquiry
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Browse the catalog from homepage search to book detail
description: Verifies that a visitor can search the catalog from the homepage and open a matching book detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Use the catalog search from the homepage
Click a search result for a book
Verify the book detail view is displayed

title: Complete a borrowing transaction from a QR code at the kiosk
description: This test verifies that an unlocked kiosk can process a borrowing QR code and complete the borrow transaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /kiosk
Fill kiosk PIN with a valid PIN
Submit the PIN
Scan a borrowing QR code
Verify the borrowing transaction is completed
Verify the loan is marked as processed

title: Search the catalog and review matching results
description: A visitor can search the catalog and see matching book results after submitting a query.

steps.description: Navigate to /books
Fill in the search field with a unique book title keyword
Submit the search
Verify matching book results are displayed
Verify the results reflect the search query

title: Complete a return transaction from a QR code at the kiosk
description: This test verifies that an unlocked kiosk can process a return QR code and complete the return transaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /kiosk
Fill kiosk PIN with a valid PIN
Submit the PIN
Scan a return QR code
Verify the return transaction is completed
Verify the loan is marked as returned

title: View a book's details
description: A visitor can open a book detail page and see the book's full information.

steps.description: Navigate to a book detail page
Verify the book detail view is displayed
Verify book information is displayed

title: Complete profile setup and proceed to phone verification
description: Verifies that a new member can finish profile completion and reach the WhatsApp verification step with the submitted information accepted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /register/profile
Fill in the identity number field with a valid identity number
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Fill in the address field with a valid address
Submit the profile form
Verify the WhatsApp verification step is displayed

title: Add a book to the borrow draft
description: A registered member can add a book from its detail page and see the borrow draft update.

steps.description: Navigate to /books
Click a book entry
Add the book to the borrow draft
Verify the borrow draft is updated
Verify the book appears in the draft

title: Accept the WhatsApp verification code and finish onboarding
description: Verifies that a member can enter a valid WhatsApp verification code and complete phone verification successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /register/whatsapp
Fill in the verification code field with a valid code
Submit the verification code
Verify the onboarding completion state is displayed

title: Generate a return QR code from loan history
description: This verifies that a member can select an active loan in loan history and generate a return QR code successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /loans/history
Select a borrowed book for return
Generate the return QR code
Verify a return QR code is displayed

title: Start a member registration visit at the kiosk
description: This test verifies that an unlocked kiosk can start a member registration visit flow for a library user.

steps.description: Navigate to /kiosk
Fill kiosk PIN with a valid PIN
Submit the PIN
Click the member registration action
Verify a visit or registration flow is started
Verify the kiosk remains in an operational state

title: Open a book detail from search results
description: A visitor can move from search results to the selected book detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Review the search results list
Click a book result
Verify a book detail view is displayed
Verify the selected book details are displayed

title: Upload a document and review similarity results
description: Verifies that an authenticated member can submit an academic document for similarity checking and view the resulting report.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /similarity
Choose an academic document file
Run the similarity check
Verify the similarity percentage is displayed
Verify the similarity report is displayed

title: Review active and past loans
description: This verifies that a member can open loan history and see both active borrowed books and completed borrowing history.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /loans/history
Verify active borrowed books are displayed
Verify completed borrowing history is displayed

title: Record a guest visit at the kiosk
description: This test verifies that an unlocked kiosk can record a guest visit successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /kiosk
Fill kiosk PIN with a valid PIN
Submit the PIN
Click the guest visit action
Verify the guest visit is recorded
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Review the current borrow draft and remove a book
description: Verifies that a member can open the borrow draft, remove a book, and see the draft update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /loans/request
Remove one book from the borrow draft
Verify the borrow draft is updated
Verify the removed book is no longer displayed

title: Explore homepage discovery sections
description: A visitor can browse the homepage discovery sections and navigate onward to another public page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the popular books section
Scroll to the new books section
Click a navigation link to another public page
Verify the user lands on a different page
Verify the destination page is displayed

title: Generate a borrowing QR code from the borrow draft
description: Verifies that a member can generate a borrowing QR code from the current draft and view it on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /loans/request
Generate the borrowing QR code
Verify the borrowing QR code is displayed

title: Open a book from the homepage
description: A visitor can discover a book entry from the homepage and open its detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a book entry from the homepage discovery area
Verify a book detail view is displayed
Verify the selected book information is displayed

title: Update profile details
description: This verifies that a member can change profile information and save the updated details successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/profile
Update the profile information with valid values
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile details are displayed

title: Filter catalog results before searching
description: A visitor can combine search text with filters and see the catalog update to matching results.

steps.description: Navigate to /books
Fill in the search field with a relevant catalog keyword
Select a filter option
Submit the search
Verify filtered book results are displayed
Verify the results list is narrowed by the selected filter

title: Update security preferences
description: This verifies that a member can change security settings and save the updated preferences successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/security
Update a security preference with a valid value
Save the security changes
Verify the updated security settings are displayed

title: Attempt borrowing access as a visitor
description: A visitor who is not logged in sees that borrowing draft access is unavailable from a book detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to a book detail page
Attempt to add the book to the borrow draft
Verify borrowing draft access is unavailable
Verify the book is not added to a draft

title: Browse thesis listings and open a thesis detail
description: This verifies that a visitor can browse undergraduate thesis listings and open a record to view its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /skripsi
Verify thesis listings are displayed
Open a thesis record from the list
Verify the thesis detail view is displayed

title: Open popular or new books from the homepage
description: Verifies that a visitor can discover featured books from the homepage and reach a book detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a featured popular or new book
Verify the book detail view is displayed

title: Browse internship report listings and open a report detail
description: This verifies that a visitor can browse internship report listings and open a record to view its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /internship-reports
Verify internship report listings are displayed
Open an internship report record from the list
Verify the internship report detail view is displayed

title: Open member profile settings
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can open the profile settings page and view editable profile details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/profile
Verify editable profile details are displayed

title: Keep required profile fields from submitting incomplete onboarding data
description: Verifies that the profile form prevents submission when required onboarding information is missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /register/profile
Submit the profile form without filling required fields
Verify profile validation errors are visible

title: Review notifications list
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can open notifications and see the current notification list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /notifications
Verify notifications are displayed

title: Switch between loan history sections
description: This verifies that a member can move between active loans and borrowing history within the loan history page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /loans/history
Review the active loans section
Review the completed borrowing history section
Verify both loan sections are visible

title: Reject an invalid WhatsApp verification code
description: Verifies that entering an invalid verification code does not complete phone verification and surfaces an error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /register/whatsapp
Fill in the verification code field with an invalid code
Submit the verification code
Verify a verification error is visible

title: Open member security settings
description: This verifies that an authenticated member can open the security settings page and view available security preferences.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/security
Verify security preferences are displayed

title: Open the library overview and team information
description: This verifies that a visitor can read the about page and navigate to the team page to review staff information.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify the library overview is displayed
Open the team page
Verify team information is displayed

title: Open a notification detail
description: This verifies that a member can open a notification item and view its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /notifications
Open a notification item
Verify the notification details are displayed

title: Keep the contact form from submitting incomplete information
description: Verifies that the contact form shows validation feedback when required fields are left blank.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form without filling required fields
Verify contact validation errors are visible

title: Reject an invalid kiosk PIN
description: This test verifies that entering an invalid kiosk PIN keeps the kiosk locked and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /kiosk
Fill kiosk PIN with an invalid PIN
Submit the PIN
Verify the kiosk remains locked
Verify a PIN validation error is visible

title: Require a document before running similarity check
description: Verifies that the similarity page prevents submission until a document is selected and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /similarity
Run the similarity check without choosing a document
Verify a document selection validation error is visible

title: Show validation for incomplete profile changes
description: This verifies that the profile settings form shows validation feedback when required information is missing or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings/profile
Clear a required profile field
Save the profile changes
Verify a profile validation error is visible

title: Show validation when the contact form is incomplete
description: This verifies that the contact form shows validation feedback when required fields are missing or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form without filling required fields
Verify contact form validation errors are visible

title: Handle an invalid QR code at the kiosk
description: This test verifies that scanning an invalid QR code does not complete a transaction and shows an error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /kiosk
Fill kiosk PIN with a valid PIN
Submit the PIN
Scan an invalid QR code
Verify no transaction is completed
Verify a QR validation error is visible

title: Read the privacy policy
description: This verifies that a visitor can open and read the privacy policy page.

steps.description: Navigate to /privacy-policy
Verify the privacy policy content is displayed

title: Handle an empty loan history state
description: This verifies that a member with no visible loans is shown an empty state instead of a broken history view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /loans/history
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Read the terms of service
description: This verifies that a visitor can open and read the terms of service page.

steps.description: Navigate to /terms-of-service
Verify the terms of service content is displayed

title: Handle an empty notifications state
description: This verifies that the notifications page shows an empty state when there are no notifications to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the member credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /notifications
Verify an empty state message is visible
